posts.cookedHtml:
The Automation was not executed properly.
Example Run ID: a7f38e57ef64ce5d423119d5d69230f6
And it was being removed from the history after a while.

Board:

image1966×610 72.1 KB

Please note the following:

  • “Notes” column is a Monday Doc column type.
  • Then the “Lesson Type” is a dropdown.
  • “Note Status” is a status.

Automation:
When Lesson Type & Notes changed, and not empty, the Note Status column should be changed to “Done”.

Automation(there’s a in progress in run history, but it will be removed after):

image1920×947 61 KB

No History even when filtered Fails:

image2300×1364 114 KB

Is this a bug on Monday.com? or is there another way on how to properly check columns for Monday Doc using Automation?
Thank you!
